license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iktccwn
title: Using the Biomate 5 Spectrophotometer
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Turn on the spectrophotometer and allow to warm up for 10 min 00:10:00
On the home menu, use the arrow keys to highlight the desired "test name" (e.g., dsDNA+, scan noise) and select enter
Load position 1 with the blank, and the remaining cells with your sample.
The program will ask you to confirm if you are running the samples
The program will automatically set the baseline absorbance with the blank, and then report the absorbance for each of the samples.
Take a picture of the absorbance profiles.
